purpose: PapyGreek UPOS/XPOS convention decomposition (measurement only; mirrors the PROIEL convention decomposition). Reproduces the pinned neural_papygreek_test UPOS/XPOS from the model's own outputs, then partitions each gap into annotation/encoding convention vs residual real error. Changes NO published number; nothing fitted to the fold.
model: grc-joint neural pipeline (the model behind the published PapyGreek row)
protocol: ONE canonical SEQUENTIAL run (batch_size=None), gold tokenization, official conll18_ud_eval; the same standing as the PROIEL decomposition. Batch-32 is not prediction-identical on this fold, so sequential is required to reproduce the pinned row.

upos_decomposition.finding: the coordinator class (gold CCONJ — καί/δέ/τε…) carries 57% of all UPOS errors; the merged training labels tag these words under three conventions (c/CCONJ vs the non-AGDT b/X pos-code vs d/ADV) and the model drifts to the b/X and d readings.

xpos_decomposition.additive_check: coordinator + common_gender + underscore + residual == total_xpos_errors; the four pts sum to the XPOS gap (verified in code + tests)
xpos_decomposition.finding: of the 23.24-pt XPOS gap, 13.6 pts is convention/encoding (5.1 coordinator pos-code + 5.9 common-gender 'c' over-prediction + 2.6 the fold's un-normalized '_' slots) and only ~9.6 pts is real morphology error; forgiving the three, XPOS is 90.4%. 1092 gold tokens carry a literal '_' slot (fold-v2 did NOT normalize '_'→'-').

summary:
PapyGreek convention decomposition over 24105 words
  UPOS 91.0% (gap 9.0%): coordinator class (gold CCONJ) 5.1% = 57% of all UPOS errors (1236 tokens) + 3.8% other
    top UPOS confusions (gold → predicted):
      CCONJ → X: 784 (36% of UPOS errors)
      CCONJ → ADV: 441 (20% of UPOS errors)
      NOUN → ADJ: 115 (5% of UPOS errors)
      PRON → DET: 99 (5% of UPOS errors)
      ADV → X: 86 (4% of UPOS errors)
      ADV → ADJ: 74 (3% of UPOS errors)
      ADJ → NOUN: 63 (3% of UPOS errors)
      PRON → ADJ: 50 (2% of UPOS errors)
      ADV → SCONJ: 36 (2% of UPOS errors)
      NOUN → X: 32 (1% of UPOS errors)
  XPOS 76.8% (gap 23.2%): 5.1% coordinator pos-code + 5.9% common-gender + 2.6% '_'-encoding = 13.6% convention/encoding, + 9.6% real morphology error
    forgiving those three, XPOS would be 90.4% (1092 gold words carry a literal '_' slot)
